description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: This document defines the steps for an operator to deposit to Aave lending pools.
â—¦ The SLL Operator, acting as `RELAYER`, initiates a deposit to an Aave instance.
â—¦ Pre-conditions are checked: SLL contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Aave ICD).
â—¦ The SLL Operator identifies the `underlying` asset address and Aave `pool` address from the specific Aave ICD.
â—¦ The SLL Operator approves the Aave `pool` to spend the `underlying` asset from the ALM Proxy.

â—¦ The SLL Operator calls the `supply(address asset, uint256 amount, address onBehalfOf, uint16 referralCode)` function on the Aave `pool`, providing the `underlying` asset address, `amount`, ALM `proxy` address (as `onBehalfOf`), and referral code (typically 0).
â—¦ The ALM Proxy receives `aTokens` representing the deposited assets.

â—¦ For detailed call structures, instance-specific parameters (aToken address, underlying asset address, pool address, rate limits), and operational examples, refer to the specific Aave Instance Configuration Document (ICD) (e.g., [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.3.1.2.1.3 - Instance-specific Operational Processes](7895798c-50e2-4fa6-b4e9-5b9f259f822d) or other relevant Aave ICDs).
description:
Extra spaces have been removed.

---

The following have been kept unchanged:

- Code blocks/lines have been kept unchanged excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces
  - Interlinear spaces
- Table layouts excepting the removal of:
  - Line-final spaces

Newlines have not been changed.

diff: This document defines the steps for an operator to deposit to Aave lending pools.
â—¦ The SLL Operator, acting as `RELAYER`, initiates a deposit to an Aave instance.
â—¦ Pre-conditions are checked: SLL contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Aave ICD).
â—¦ The SLL Operator identifies the `underlying` asset address and Aave `pool` address from the specific Aave ICD.
â—¦ The SLL Operator approves the Aave `pool` to spend the `underlying` asset from the ALM Proxy.

â—¦ The SLL Operator calls the `supply(address asset, uint256 amount, address onBehalfOf, uint16 referralCode)` function on the Aave `pool`, providing the `underlying` asset address, `amount`, ALM `proxy` address (as `onBehalfOf`), and referral code (typically 0).
â—¦ The ALM Proxy receives `aTokens` representing the deposited assets.
â—¦ For detailed call structures, instance
the specific Aave Instance Configuration Document (ICD) (e.g., [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.3.1.2.1.3 - Instance-specific Operational Processes](7895798c-50e2-4fa6-b4e9-5b9f259f822d) or other
- Pre-conditions are checked: SLL contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Aave ICD).
- The SLL Operator identifies the `underlying` asset address and Aave `pool` address from the specific Aave ICD.
- The SLL Operator approves the Aave `pool` to spend the `underlying` asset from the ALM Proxy.

- The SLL Operator calls the `supply(address asset, uint256 amount, address onBehalfOf, uint16 referralCode)` function on the Aave `pool`, providing the `underlying` asset address, `amount`, ALM `proxy` address (as `onBehalfOf`), and referral code (typically 0).
- The ALM Proxy receives `aTokens` representing the deposited assets.

- For detailed call structures, instance-specific parameters (aToken address, underlying asset address, pool address, rate limits), and operational examples, refer to the specific Aave Instance Configuration Document (ICD) (e.g., [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.3.1.2.1.3 - Instance-specific Operational Processes](7895798c-50e2-4fa6-b4e9-5b9f259f822d) or other relevant Aave ICDs).

This document defines the steps for an operator to deposit to Aave lending pools.
Operator, acting as `RELAYER`, initiates a deposit to an Aave instance.
contract `isActive`, ALM Proxy has sufficient underlying asset, and the deposit amount is within instance-specific `RateLimits` (defined in the relevant Aave ICD).
Operator identifies the `underlying` asset address and Aave `pool` address from the specific Aave ICD.
Operator approves the Aave `pool` to spend the `underlying` asset from the ALM Proxy.

Operator calls the `supply(address asset, uint256 amount, address onBehalfOf, uint16 referralCode)` function on the Aave `pool`, providing the `underlying` asset address, `amount`, ALM `proxy` address (as `onBehalfOf`), and referral code (typically 0).
- The ALM Proxy receives `aTokens` representing the deposited assets.

- For detailed call structures, instance-specific parameters (aToken address, underlying asset address, pool address, rate limits), and operational examples, refer to the specific Aave Instance Configuration Document (ICD) (e.g., [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.3.1.2.1.3 - Instance-specific Operational Processes](7895798c-50e2-4fa6-b4e9-5b9f259f822d) or other relevant Aave ICDs).
